267 I0200_ANEMIA_CD I0200_ANEMIA_CD I0200 Active Diagnoses: Anemia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a diagnosis of anemia (e.g., aplastic, iron deficiency, pernicious, and sickle cell) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
